chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.T.R.A 252 to 255 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.26 2. For hearing of CMA No.347/2023 3. For hearing of main case 18.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Din Qazi, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Faheem Bhayo, advocate for the applicants Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondents These reference applications are pending since 2023 without any progress. Even today a brief is being held on behalf of the applicants’ counsel and adjournment being sought for no cogent reason. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is directed to place copy in each connected file. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
